Package nonprofitbookkeeping.service

Class SettingsService

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.service.SettingsService
public class SettingsService extends Object
Service for loading and saving application settings.

  • Method Details

    • getSettings

      public SettingsModel getSettings()
      Returns the current settings instance.
      Returns:
      the settings

    • loadSettings

      public void loadSettings(File companyDir) throws IOException
      Loads settings from the persistent document store.
      Parameters:
      companyDir - retained for backwards compatibility but ignored by the method
      Throws:
      IOException - if reading from the database fails

    • saveSettings

      public void saveSettings(File companyDir) throws IOException
      Saves current settings to the persistent document store.
      Parameters:
      companyDir - retained for backwards compatibility but ignored by the method
      Throws:
      IOException - if the database write fails

    • resolveDefaultReportPeriod

      public ReportPeriodPreset resolveDefaultReportPeriod()
      Convenience accessor used throughout the UI layer.
      Returns:
      the report period preset

    • resolveFiscalYearStart

      public MonthDay resolveFiscalYearStart()
      Provides the fiscal year start as a MonthDay.
      Returns:
      the month day
